description:
Same lowering (.12a) + same runtime (.12b), but in-process via cranelift-jit.

Scope:
- JITModule with the runtime staticlib's symbols pre-registered.
- Per-function compile-on-demand (manual trigger in this ticket — counter-based tier-up is .13).
- Mixed execution: jitted fns call interpreted fns and vice versa via the Value ABI boundary defined in .12b.
- Functions outside the in-scope subset stay tier-0 forever.

Verification: same fact/fib samples, called from interpreter, transparent jit. Microbenchmark vs. tier-0 for confidence the lowering is actually fast.
title: JIT driver: in-process cranelift-jit, mixed execution
